ogTitle: Purlewaugh vs Putta Bucca: Climate Safety

heading: Purlewaugh vs Putta Bucca — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Purlewaugh, New South Wales and Putta Bucca, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Purlewaugh has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Putta Bucca (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Purlewaugh or Putta Bucca safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Purlewaugh has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Putta Bucca scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Purlewaugh scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Putta Bucca scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Purlewaugh or Putta Bucca?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Purlewaugh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
